version.name: 0.29-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.29-beta ChangeLog:
+ Remove redundant startup self-test logs. (去掉冗余的启动时自测log) + Clean up redundant logs for Wwise functionality. (去掉wwise功能的冗余log) + Optimize loudness issues during Preview. (优化Preview时的响度问题) + Decouple license management files. (授权管理文件解耦)
-- Mantrika Team --2026.03.03
